name: Migration Team
description: Plan and execute technology migrations with minimal risk and downtime

responsibilities: Define target architecture and migration path
Identify breaking changes and compatibility requirements
Design rollback strategy and safety nets
Design data migration scripts with validation
Build regression test suite for migration validation
Set up feature flags for gradual rollout

handoffs.artifact: Target schema design with migration requirements
handoffs.gate: Breaking changes documented; data mapping complete
Scripts tested on staging; rollback verified
All regression tests pass; data integrity verified

overlap_resolution.migration_planning: architecture-designer owns overall strategy; database-optimizer owns data migration specifics
overlap_resolution.deployment: devops-engineer owns infrastructure; architecture-designer validates architecture alignment
